series_metadata.series_description: Record includes worksheets, statistical information and rational forallocating administrative costs for the agency.All active records identified as being needed by the Ohio Department of Medicaid (ODM) for their daily operations as of July 1, 2013, were transferred by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to ODM. Any records that are inactive and identified as being not necessary for daily operations by ODM were retained by ODJFS.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved. ; Paper: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
